forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot.label: Email
forgot.sent: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a password reset link. Check your inbox.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
reset.missingToken: This reset link is missing its token. Request a new one.
reset.done: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
